sourcesContent: import { Box, Button, Container, Grid } from "@mui/material"; import AppDownloadButton, { Platform } from "components/app_download_button"; import DownloadButton from "components/download_button"; import ActionsHandler from "utilities/actions_handler"; import styles from 'utilities/global_styles.module.css' const HeaderSection = () => { return Open Community for every Student in Europe Everyone matters!
